Bug / Task Description: Add a Lamport logical clock implementation to the clock package. Implement LamportClock with Tick (increments counter, returns timestamp), Witness (takes max of local and remote counter then increments for causal ordering), Now (returns current timestamp without advancing), NodeID, and Value accessors. Implement LamportTimestamp with Counter (uint64) and NodeID (string) fields, a Compare method using counter-first ordering with NodeID as tiebreaker, and a Bytes method for network serialization.
Commit Subject: feat(clock): add Lamport logical clock implementation
